_comment: References proven untrustworthy by the local-asy oracle (_oracle.js): real Asymptote 3.05 with the TeXeR wrapper produces a bbox that MATCHES HiTeXeR but DIVERGES from these texer_pngs. Do not chase size/aspect scores on these ids; do not delete the pngs (refetch when VPN available). Generated 2026-07-07 from _oracle_size_sweep.txt.
